text: and then the grey brakes. They are above the sea of storms. The world below is lost,
and here, on the roof of the world, lies their destination, the shrine of the storm's heart.
It is not a place of gold and glory, but of stone and endurance. The runes on the broken
monoliths glow with the last light of the sun, a final fading promise. The shrine waits as it
has for centuries, for the desperate and the doomed.
